title: Technical Documentation Framework — frontmatter
description: Moderate YAML frontmatter carried by every document in the corpus. See FRAMEWORK.md §6.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier; MUST equal the filename stem and be unique across the corpus.

title.description: Human-readable title; SHOULD match the H1.

type.description: One of the eight document types. See FRAMEWORK.md §4.

status.description: Position in the document's maturity arc. See FRAMEWORK.md §10.

created.description: ISO date the document was created; never changes.

updated.description: ISO date of the last material change; MUST be >= created.

tags.description: Flat list of kebab-case topic tags.

supersedes.description: id of the document this one replaces (or empty).

superseded_by.description: id of the document that replaced this one (or empty). Required when status is superseded.
